name: Harp of Gilded Plenty
description:
This golden harp is sculpted in the image of the god Iallanis, depicted as a young cloud giant woman. When a creature comes within 5 feet of the harp, the instrument animates and is capable of speaking, singing, and playing by itself.
Whenever you attempt to attune to the harp, you must first make either a {@dc 15} Charisma ({@skill Performance}) check or a {@dc 20} Charisma ({@skill Persuasion}) check to convince the harp that you are worthy, attuning to the harp on a success. If you fail, you
